center.name: 達連山脈
center.summary: 達連山脈是南美洲的山脈，橫跨哥倫比亞西北部和巴拿馬東部，全長35公里，平均海拔高度437米，最高點海拔高度1,875米，該地區每50年發生6至7次地震。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Colombia, Ecuador, and Panama (Serranía del Darién and western Andean slope of Colombia and Ecuador)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the borderline area of Panama and Colombia (Serranía del Darién and Serranía de Pirre)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The others are found in the Serranía del Darién and Santander department, south on the west slope of the Andes into Ecuador as far as El Oro Province, and on the east slope of the Andes from Sucumbíos Province in Ecuador south into northern Peru's Cajamarca and Amazonas departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Serranía del Darién and Serranía del Baudó (Colombia and Panama)
